The simulation module displays various colored toys, which are picked up and placed into corresponding color-coded bins using robotic arms, demonstrating hand and wrist motion control.
In the simulation module, the user practices passing a needle through various targets designed to improve precision in robotic suturing techniques.

In the demo module, the surgeon practices vessel control by coagulating side branches of the main artery at two spots before cutting them in the middle. The surgeon attempts to burn and cut, but the vessel bleeds due to improper technique. The coagulation tool is then used to control the bleeding.
